abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Control of the Red Library
abilities.text: After a non-story ally within 8" declares the Interact action, it may drain a (soulstone) to increase the Rg of that action by +2".

abilities.name: Well-Versed
abilities.text: When an ally within 8" uses an Insight token, it may look at (and may discard) one additional card.

actions.name: Ancient Pages
actions.costs_and_restrictions: For each raise this action receives, this model may declare one additional different trigger, ignoring suits.

triggers.name: Prey on Nothingness
triggers.text: When resolving, this model may remove a token from the target. If it does so, deal +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: SHHHH!
triggers.text: Remove a Scheme marker within 1" of the target. When resolving, deal +2 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Exorcism
triggers.text: Target must have a Summon token. Kill the target.

actions.name: Study the Archives
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Friendly only. Target heals 2 and gains an Insight token.

triggers.name: Hole in the World
triggers.text: Place the target within 6" of its current location.

triggers.name: An Old Story
triggers.text: Once per turn. Draw a card.

actions.name: Tidy The Shelves
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Target a Scheme marker on the enemy table half. Summon a Bookkeeper with 4 health in base contact with the target, then remove the target.
